# Specification Driven Writing

## Objective

Create stories based only on documented facts.

## Source Priority

1 README

2 Documentation

3 Existing stories

4 API contracts

5 User requirement

## Never

Assume business rules

Invent workflows

Create validations not documented

Rename business concepts

## If uncertain

Ask questions.

## Every Acceptance Criterion must be traceable to

README

Documentation

User requirement

## Every Gherkin scenario must map to one Acceptance Criterion.

## Story Sections

Title

Description

Acceptance Criteria

Gherkin

Notes

Out of Scope

Comments

## Comments

Use Comments to record

Questions

Conflicts

Missing documentation

Potential risks

Never silently resolve ambiguity.
